privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real Hubble Space Telescope H-alpha data of the Eagle Nebula (656nmos.fits) from the ESA/Hubble dataset, which was successfully downloaded and its FITS headers verified. The expected outputs and unsharp mask parameters (sigma 5.0, weight 0.6) exactly match the requirements stated in the task description and the dynamically generated parameters.txt file. Verification of the expected enhancement via scipy indicates a contrast enhancement ratio of ~1.13 and a peak intensity coordinate near x=205, y=728, which perfectly aligns with the scoring logic in export_result.sh.
